summary: Iteration 25: Tested Password Reset/Change and PWA features. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). All password endpoints work correctly - change password with validation, admin reset password with temp password generation. PWA manifest.json and icon.svg accessible and valid. Frontend: All UI components present and functional - Change My Password card, Reset Password buttons, temp password display. 401 interceptor returns proper 401 for invalid tokens. Idle timeout hook properly implemented with 5-min timer and event listeners.

minor.issue: CDN/Cloudflare serving cached HTML without PWA meta tags (theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app-capable, manifest link). Local index.html has correct tags - this is a CDN caching issue, not a code bug.

success_rate.backend: 100% - 12/12 tests passed (3 skipped due to CDN caching issue)

test_credentials: Owner: sadam.owner@slmco.local / SLMCo2026! (password was reset during testing)
seed_data_creation: Reset owner password to SLMCo2026! and Brad S password to SLMCo2026! after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 verified password reset/change features and PWA setup. Backend endpoints: POST /api/auth/change-password (validates current password, min 6 chars for new), POST /api/users/{user_id}/reset-password (generates 10-char temp password). Frontend: Settings page has 'Change My Password' card (data-testid='settings-change-password-card') with current/new password inputs. Staff list shows 'Reset password' buttons (data-testid='settings-user-reset-pw-{id}'). Temp password displays inline (data-testid='settings-temp-pw-{id}'). useIdleTimeout hook in App.js tracks 5-min inactivity. 401 interceptor in api.js clears auth on expired token. PWA manifest.json and icon.svg are accessible at root. Note: CDN may cache old index.html without PWA meta tags - local file has correct tags.

change_password_backend.success_flow: PASS - Change password with correct current password works

reset_password_backend.temp_password_login: PASS - Temp password works for login

change_password_frontend.success_toast: PASS - Shows 'Your password has been updated'

reset_password_frontend.confirmation_dialog: PASS - Confirmation dialog appears on click

idle_timeout.event_listeners: PASS - mousemove, mousedown, keydown, touchstart, scroll
